question: Show the latest appraisal value for every held property in Boston.
gold_sql: SELECT p.name, v.market_value FROM properties p JOIN valuations v ON v.property_id = p.property_id WHERE p.market = 'Boston' AND p.status != 'Sold' AND v.valuation_date = (SELECT MAX(valuation_date) FROM valuations WHERE property_id = p.property_id)
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
.properties.property_id, 
       p.name,
       p.address,
       p.city,
       p.market,
       p.submarket,
       p.property_type,
       p.building_class,
       p.rentable_sqft,
       p.year_built,
       p.year_renovated,
       p.num_floors,
       p.acquisition_date,
       p.acquisition_price,
       p.current_market_value,
       p.ownership_pct,
       p.status,
       p.disposition_date,
       v.market_value,
       v.cap_rate,
       v.appraiser
FROM properties p
JOIN valuations v ON p.property_id = v.property_id
WHERE p.city = 'Boston'
  AND p.status = 'In Development'
  AND p.disposition_date IS NULL
  AND v.valuation_date = (
    SELECT MAX(valuation_date)
    FROM valuations
    WHERE property_id = p.property_id
  )
